spec_summary: suma dos números enteros y retorna el resultado.

tasks.name: Define sum function
tasks.description: Create a function named sum that takes two integer parameters a and b and returns their sum.
tasks.acceptance_criterion: The function sum is syntactically correct and returns a + b for any integer inputs.

tasks.name: Verify sum with example
tasks.description: Call the sum function with inputs 2 and 3 and check that the result equals 5.
